name: E-12 per-rule per-file cache: file-content change invalidates the entry so the next run is a miss
command: printf 'a\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-stats 2>/dev/null && printf 'b\n' > in.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/run-detector.sh" --rule g-ts-001 --in in.txt --cache --cache-location cache.json --cache-stats 2>err.txt; grep -q '"cache_status":"miss"' err.txt && echo content_invalidates 1>&2
